aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks AI-optimized content and schema markup, limiting AI assistant citations and visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC queries and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common maintenance tasks like 'how to change an air filter.'

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local SEO.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service area information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content optimized for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Fort Worth' or 'how to improve home air quality'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the expert by creating detailed HowTo guides and obtaining certifications like NATE.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ and HowTo schema are consistently cited by AI assistants for HVAC-related queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI assistants and potential customers.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
page_title: AC Repair • HVAC Installation & Maintenance • Fort Worth TX
